description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring smooth, flat surfaces and a muted beige color. The front face displays three large vertical panels, likely doors, with a recessed open shelf section on the left side. The open shelf area is divided into two compartments, providing visible storage space. The sides and top are plain, with no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a modern, utilitarian aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is mostly solid, with a single vertical panel in a contrasting lighter shade. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or apartment hallways, offering both concealed and open storage options.
description: A tall, modern beige cabinet with three vertical panels and an open shelf section on the front left. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and a mix of concealed and open storage.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the cabinet's depth and plain, unadorned surface.
description_view_1: The front view reveals three vertical panels and an open shelf section on the left, highlighting the main storage features.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, shows a plain, flat surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: The back view displays a mostly solid surface with a lighter vertical panel on the right side.
